2026-04-13T22:11:08.2731408Z ---
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2731898Z description: |
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2732621Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2734301Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2735722Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2736525Z 
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2736735Z on:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2737125Z   push:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2737553Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2738065Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2738426Z 
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2738651Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2739019Z 
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2739228Z network: defaults
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2740267Z 
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2740457Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2740938Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2741525Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2741926Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2742281Z   noop:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2742677Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2743162Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2743562Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2744767Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2745840Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2746387Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2746946Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2747594Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2748038Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2748492Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2748925Z       steps:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2749362Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2750039Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2750627Z           env:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2751461Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2752484Z           with:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2752876Z             script: |
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2753574Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2754701Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2755679Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2756562Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2756991Z               }
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2757251Z 
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2757854Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2758934Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2759719Z 
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2760441Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2761747Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2763042Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2764661Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2765574Z               }
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2835735Z 
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2836402Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2837290Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2837870Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2839795Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2841371Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2842038Z               });
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2842667Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);

2026-04-13T22:11:08.2899384Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2899962Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2900368Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2900725Z   noop:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2901141Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2901644Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2902018Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2902918Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2904228Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2904777Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2905351Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2905985Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2906432Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2906898Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2907347Z       steps:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2907802Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2908468Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2909074Z           env:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2910202Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2911767Z           with:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2978308Z             script: |
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2979245Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2980216Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2981223Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2982418Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2982875Z               }
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2983135Z 
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2983463Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T22:11:08.2985240Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3001971Z 
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3002747Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3005370Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3006680Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3008274Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3009089Z               }
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3009360Z 
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3009754Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3010589Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3011166Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3013034Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3013666Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3014611Z               });
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3015250Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3016494Z 
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3016674Z tools:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3017477Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3017875Z   github:
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3018295Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3018684Z

2026-04-13T22:11:08.3019679Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3020685Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-13T22:11:08.3046413Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
